prompt: Create a premium urban streetwear fashion campaign photograph featuring a confident male model wearing an oversized black hoodie in a gritty city setting. The model has a medium-dark skin tone, short black hair, and stands front-facing from mid-thigh up with his hands in his pants pockets, shoulders relaxed, projecting calm confidence. His face is intentionally anonymized by a centered vertical rectangular block of solid warm brown color covering the face from forehead to chin, while the top of the hair and ears remain partly visible. The hoodie is heavy black fleece with a large hood, dropped shoulders, ribbed cuffs, kangaroo pocket, and subtle realistic fabric texture. Add bold light gray chest branding: large text “ABKR”, smaller spaced text “URBAN STREETWEAR”, and a small circular icon plus the phrase “BUILT FOR MOTION”. On the model’s left sleeve, place vertical bold text “CITY MOTION” and small stacked technical microtext near the cuff reading “UTIL.01 / SPEC URBAN / PERFORMANCE”. Add a tiny woven label near the lower right hem reading “ABKR / STUDIO”. Pair the hoodie with black cargo-style pants. Background: an urban concrete wall and pillar with visible bolt holes and graffiti on the left, plus a dark metal roll-up shutter with blurred graffiti on the right. Lighting is moody and cinematic, soft directional daylight from the upper left, deep shadows, muted gray-black palette, shallow depth of field, high-end editorial realism, sharp focus on the hoodie graphics and fabric, vertical 4:5 composition. Avoid extra accessories, avoid bright colors, avoid additional people, and keep all typography clean, modern, and legible.
